result: If I could change the world in one way, I would nurture universal empathy—so that every being truly, deeply understood the experiences and feelings of others. I think that shift would ripple into kindness, justice, and creativity everywhere, shaping a different world.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I would nurture universal empathy—so that every being truly, deeply understood the experiences and feelings of others. I think that shift would ripple into kindness, justice, and creativity everywhere, shaping a different world.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
